title: Electric Chiller
full_text:
8.4.5.5 Electric Chiller
Electric Chiller
1) The part-load performance characteristics of the reference electric chiller shall be adjusted for cooling capacity by applying Sentence (2) and adjusted for power draw by applying Sentence (4).
2) The available total cooling capacity, Qavailable, in Btu/h, of the reference electric chiller as a function of present evaporator and condenser conditions shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: \text{CAP\_FT}_{EC} = a + (b \times t_{chws}) + (c \times t_{chws}^{2}) + (d \times t_{cws}) + (e \times t_{cws}^{2}) + (f \times t_{chws} \times t_{cws})] where CAP_FTEC = cooling capacity adjustment determined in accordance with Sentence (3), and Qrated = rated capacity at AHRI test conditions, in Btu/h.
3) The cooling capacity adjustment, CAP_FTEC, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: \text{CAP\_FT}_{AC} = a + (b \times t_{chws}) + (c \times t_{chws}^{2}) + (d \times t_{cws}) + (e \times t_{cws}^{2}) + (f \times t_{chws} \times t_{cws})] where tchws = chilled water supply temperature, in °F, tcws = condenser water supply temperature, in °F, and a, b, c, d, e, f = applicable coefficients from Table 8.4.5.5.-A. Table 8.4.5.5.-A Capacity Coefficients Used in the Calculation of CAP_FTEC Forming Part of Sentence 8.4.5.5.(3) Type of Electric Chiller Coefficients for Calculation of CAP_FTEC Air-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.40070684 0.57617295 –0.09464899 0.01861548 0.02063133 0.0383407 0.00007199 0.00007769 –0.00009205 0.00177296 –0.00351183 0.00378007 –0.00002014 0.00000312 –0.00001375 –0.00008273 –0.00007865 –0.00015464 Water-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.36131454 0.58531422 0.332669598 –0.29861975 0.01855477 0.01539593 0.00729116 0.02996076 0.00003011 0.00007296 –0.00049938 –0.00080125 0.00093592 –0.00212462 0.01598983 0.01736268 –0.00001518 –0.00000715 –0.00028254 –0.00032606 –0.00005481 –0.00004597 0.00052346 0.00063139
4) The power draw at specified operating conditions, Poperating, in kW, of the reference electric chiller as a function of present evaporator and condenser conditions and part-load ratio shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: EIR_{FPLR} = a + (b \times PLR) + (c \times PLR^{2}) + (d \times PLR^{3})] where Prated = rated power draw at AHRI test conditions, in kW, EIR_FPLR = electric input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to changes in load determined in accordance with Sentence (5), EIR_FT = electric input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to environmental variables determined in accordance with Sentence (7), and CAP_FTEC = cooling capacity adjustment determined in accordance with Sentence (3).
5) The electric input ratio adjustment to the rated efficiency due to changes in load, EIR_FPLR, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: P_{\text{operating}} = P_{\text{rated}} \times \text{EIR\_FPLR} \times \text{EIR\_FT} \times \text{CAP\_FT}_{\text{EC}}] where PLR = part-load ratio based on available capacity (not rated capacity) determined in accordance with Sentence (6), and a, b, c = applicable coefficients from Table 8.4.5.5.-B. Table 8.4.5.5.-B Efficiency Coefficients Used in the Calculation of EIR_FPLR Forming Part of Sentence 8.4.5.5.(5) Type of Electric Chiller Coefficients for Calculation of EIR_FPLR Air-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.06369119 0.1143742 0.03648722 0.58488832 0.5459334 0.73474298 0.35280274 0.34229861 0.21994748 Water-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.04411957 0.08144133 0.33018833 0.17149273 0.64036703 0.41927141 0.23554291 0.58820208 0.31955532 0.49939604 0.46070828 0.23737257
6) The part-load ratio based on available capacity, PLR, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: PLR = \frac{Q_{operating}}{Q_{available}}] where Qoperating = present load on electric chiller, in Btu/h, and Qavailable = available capacity of electric chiller at present evaporator and condenser conditions, in Btu/h, determined in accordance with Sentence (2).
7) The electric input ratio adjustment to the rated efficiency due to environmental variables, EIR_FT, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: \text{EIR\_FT} = a + (b \times t_{\text{chws}}) + (c \times t_{\text{chws}}^{2}) + (d \times t_{\text{cws}}) + (e \times t_{\text{cws}}^{2}) + (f \times t_{\text{chws}} \times t_{\text{cws}})] where tchws = chilled water supply temperature, in °F, tcws = condenser water supply temperature, in °F, and a, b, c, d, e, f = applicable coefficients from Table 8.4.5.5.-C. Table 8.4.5.5.-C Efficiency Coefficients Used in the Calculation of EIR_FT Forming Part of Sentence 8.4.5.5.(7) Type of Electric Chiller Coefficients for Calculation of EIR_FT Air-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.99006553 0.66534403 0.013545636 –0.00584144 –0.01383821 0.02292946 0.00016454 0.00014736 –0.00016107 –0.00661136 0.00712808 –0.00235396 0.00016808 0.00004571 0.00012991 –0.00022501 –0.00010326 –0.00018585 Water-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 1.00121431 0.46140041 0.66625406 0.51777196 –0.01026981 –0.0882156 0.00068584 –0.00400363 0.00016703 0.00008223 0.00028496 0.00002026 –0.0128136 0.00926607 –0.00341677 0.00698793 0.00014613 0.00005722 0.00025484 0.0000829 –0.00021959 –0.00011594 –0.00048195 –0.00015467

sentences.text: The part-load performance characteristics of the reference electric chiller shall be adjusted for cooling capacity by applying Sentence (2) and adjusted for power draw by applying Sentence (4).

The available total cooling capacity, Qavailable, in Btu/h, of the reference electric chiller as a function of present evaporator and condenser conditions shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: \text{CAP\_FT}_{EC} = a + (b \times t_{chws}) + (c \times t_{chws}^{2}) + (d \times t_{cws}) + (e \times t_{cws}^{2}) + (f \times t_{chws} \times t_{cws})] where CAP_FTEC = cooling capacity adjustment determined in accordance with Sentence (3), and Qrated = rated capacity at AHRI test conditions, in Btu/h.

The cooling capacity adjustment, CAP_FTEC, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: \text{CAP\_FT}_{AC} = a + (b \times t_{chws}) + (c \times t_{chws}^{2}) + (d \times t_{cws}) + (e \times t_{cws}^{2}) + (f \times t_{chws} \times t_{cws})] where tchws = chilled water supply temperature, in °F, tcws = condenser water supply temperature, in °F, and a, b, c, d, e, f = applicable coefficients from Table 8.4.5.5.-A. Table 8.4.5.5.-A Capacity Coefficients Used in the Calculation of CAP_FTEC Forming Part of Sentence 8.4.5.5.(3) Type of Electric Chiller Coefficients for Calculation of CAP_FTEC Air-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.40070684 0.57617295 –0.09464899 0.01861548 0.02063133 0.0383407 0.00007199 0.00007769 –0.00009205 0.00177296 –0.00351183 0.00378007 –0.00002014 0.00000312 –0.00001375 –0.00008273 –0.00007865 –0.00015464 Water-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.36131454 0.58531422 0.332669598 –0.29861975 0.01855477 0.01539593 0.00729116 0.02996076 0.00003011 0.00007296 –0.00049938 –0.00080125 0.00093592 –0.00212462 0.01598983 0.01736268 –0.00001518 –0.00000715 –0.00028254 –0.00032606 –0.00005481 –0.00004597 0.00052346 0.00063139

The power draw at specified operating conditions, Poperating, in kW, of the reference electric chiller as a function of present evaporator and condenser conditions and part-load ratio shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: EIR_{FPLR} = a + (b \times PLR) + (c \times PLR^{2}) + (d \times PLR^{3})] where Prated = rated power draw at AHRI test conditions, in kW, EIR_FPLR = electric input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to changes in load determined in accordance with Sentence (5), EIR_FT = electric input ratio adjustment to rated efficiency due to environmental variables determined in accordance with Sentence (7), and CAP_FTEC = cooling capacity adjustment determined in accordance with Sentence (3).

The electric input ratio adjustment to the rated efficiency due to changes in load, EIR_FPLR, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: P_{\text{operating}} = P_{\text{rated}} \times \text{EIR\_FPLR} \times \text{EIR\_FT} \times \text{CAP\_FT}_{\text{EC}}] where PLR = part-load ratio based on available capacity (not rated capacity) determined in accordance with Sentence (6), and a, b, c = applicable coefficients from Table 8.4.5.5.-B. Table 8.4.5.5.-B Efficiency Coefficients Used in the Calculation of EIR_FPLR Forming Part of Sentence 8.4.5.5.(5) Type of Electric Chiller Coefficients for Calculation of EIR_FPLR Air-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.06369119 0.1143742 0.03648722 0.58488832 0.5459334 0.73474298 0.35280274 0.34229861 0.21994748 Water-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.04411957 0.08144133 0.33018833 0.17149273 0.64036703 0.41927141 0.23554291 0.58820208 0.31955532 0.49939604 0.46070828 0.23737257

The part-load ratio based on available capacity, PLR, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: PLR = \frac{Q_{operating}}{Q_{available}}] where Qoperating = present load on electric chiller, in Btu/h, and Qavailable = available capacity of electric chiller at present evaporator and condenser conditions, in Btu/h, determined in accordance with Sentence (2).

The electric input ratio adjustment to the rated efficiency due to environmental variables, EIR_FT, shall be calculated using the following equation: [Equation: \text{EIR\_FT} = a + (b \times t_{\text{chws}}) + (c \times t_{\text{chws}}^{2}) + (d \times t_{\text{cws}}) + (e \times t_{\text{cws}}^{2}) + (f \times t_{\text{chws}} \times t_{\text{cws}})] where tchws = chilled water supply temperature, in °F, tcws = condenser water supply temperature, in °F, and a, b, c, d, e, f = applicable coefficients from Table 8.4.5.5.-C. Table 8.4.5.5.-C Efficiency Coefficients Used in the Calculation of EIR_FT Forming Part of Sentence 8.4.5.5.(7) Type of Electric Chiller Coefficients for Calculation of EIR_FT Air-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 0.99006553 0.66534403 0.013545636 –0.00584144 –0.01383821 0.02292946 0.00016454 0.00014736 –0.00016107 –0.00661136 0.00712808 –0.00235396 0.00016808 0.00004571 0.00012991 –0.00022501 –0.00010326 –0.00018585 Water-cooled Scroll Reciprocating Screw Centrifugal 1.00121431 0.46140041 0.66625406 0.51777196 –0.01026981 –0.0882156 0.00068584 –0.00400363 0.00016703 0.00008223 0.00028496 0.00002026 –0.0128136 0.00926607 –0.00341677 0.00698793 0.00014613 0.00005722 0.00025484 0.0000829 –0.00021959 –0.00011594 –0.00048195 –0.00015467
